snippet.description: PHP code to execute. The snippet runs inside a sandboxed subprocess against the project's container; use `container(SomeClass::class)` to resolve services. Last `return` is captured.

timeout_ms.description: Wall-clock timeout in milliseconds (default 5000). Exceeding it kills the subprocess (SIGTERM → SIGKILL).

allow_writes.description: Permit database writes via the ALTAIR_EVAL_ALLOW_WRITES env var (host-cooperative — the host's persistence config can read it and refuse writes). Defaults to false.

allow_network.description: Permit outbound network calls (lifts the function-block on curl/fsockopen/stream_socket_client and allow_url_fopen). Defaults to false.
